text: People waited Tuesday at the airport in Tacloban, the Philippines, to be evacuated from one of the areas hit hardest by a typhoon. Transportation and food supplies were devastated by the storm.

Tons of marijuana — 134 tons, in fact — sat on a makeshift platform Wednesday on a military base in Tijuana, Mexico.
